cases.title: Noisy shorthand
cases.description: Compressed phrase decoding: the trained model keeps the writer's register instead of inventing a subject.

cases.title: Ordinary typo
cases.description: Minimal useful correction: the base model also rewrites capitalization and punctuation nobody asked for.
cases.draft: i went to the store instaed

cases.title: Protected tokens
cases.description: Paths and filenames survive: the base model 'fixes' usr/bin and q3_finl_v2.pdf, the trained model keeps them.

cases.title: Window context
cases.description: Bounded accessible text from an open Notes window resolves an ambiguous 'there'.

context_snippets.visible_text: Tomorrow: meet at Union Station at 8:30 AM.

cases.title: Two personalized profiles
cases.description: The same shorthand decodes differently per user from locally learned patterns.
